trans-unit.source: Item %1 at SKU is a BOM, but the Replenishment System field is not set to Assembly or Prod. Order. Verify that the value is correct.

trans-unit.note: %1 = Item No.

trans-unit.source: Item %1 at SKU is not a BOM. Therefore, the Replenishment System field must be set to Purchase.

Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies which default order flow is used to supply this assembly item.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, hvilken standardordrestrøm, der bruges til at levere dette montageelement.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Assembly Policy - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unit in which the item is held in inventory. The base unit of measure also serves as the conversion basis for alternate units of measure.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den enhed, som varen er lagerført i. Basismåleenheden fungerer også som konverteringsbasis for alternative måleenheder.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Base Unit of Measure - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies that transactions with the item cannot be posted, for example, because the item is in quarantine.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, at transaktioner med varen ikke kan bogføres, f.eks. fordi varen er i karantæne.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Blocked - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether the item's unit cost has been adjusted, either automatically or manually.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, om varens pris er reguleret enten automatisk eller manuelt.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Cost is Adjusted - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies how the item's cost flow is recorded and whether an actual or budgeted value is capitalized and used in the cost calculation.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, hvordan varens kostprisforløb registreres, og om en faktisk eller budgetteret værdi føres som aktiv og bruges i beregningen af kostprisen.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Costing Method - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies that the item was created from a catalog item.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, at varen blev oprettet ud fra en katalogvare.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Created From Nonstock Item - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the default template that governs how to defer revenues and expenses to the periods when they occurred.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den standardskabelon, der styrer, hvordan indtjening og udgifter skal periodiseres til perioderne, når de indtræffer.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Default Deferral Template Code - Property ToolTip
Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Default Deferral Template Code - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies a description of the item.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Description - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies how consumption of the item (component) is calculated and handled in production processes. Manual: Enter and post consumption in the consumption journal manually. Forward: Automatically posts consumption according to the production order component lines when the first operation starts. Backward: Automatically calculates and posts consumption according to the production order component lines when the production order is finished. Pick + Forward / Pick + Backward: Variations with warehousing.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, hvordan forbruget af varen (komponenten) beregnes og håndteres i produktionsprocesserne. Manuelt: Angiv og bogfør forbrug i forbrugskladden manuelt. Fremad: Bogfører automatisk forbrug ifølge produktionsordrekomponentlinjerne, når den første handling starter. Baglæns: Beregner og bogfører automatisk forbrug ifølge produktionsordrekomponentlinjerne, når produktionsordren er færdig. Pluk + Fremad / Pluk + Baglæns: Variationer med lagersted.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Flushing Method - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the item's product type to link transactions made for this item with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.
trans-unit.target: Angiver varens produkttype for at knytte transaktioner, der er foretaget for denne vare, til den relevante finanskonto i overensstemmelse med den generelle bogføringsopsætning.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Gen. Prod. Posting Group - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the percentage of the item's last purchase cost that includes indirect costs, such as freight that is associated with the purchase of the item.
trans-unit.target: Angiver procentdelen af varens sidste købspris, der omfatter indirekte omkostninger, såsom fragt, der er knyttet til købet af varen.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Indirect Cost % - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies links between business transactions made for the item and an inventory account in the general ledger, to group amounts for that item type.
trans-unit.target: Angiver links mellem forretningstransaktioner, som er lavet til varen, og en lagerkonto i finansposterne for at samle beløbene for denne varetype i en gruppe.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Inventory Posting Group - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the quantity in stock for this item.
trans-unit.target: Angiver antallet på lager for denne vare.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control InventoryCtrl - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the category that the item belongs to. Item categories also contain any assigned item attributes.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den kategori, varen hører til. Varekategorier omfatter også vareattributter, der måtte være tildelt.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Item Category Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies an item group code that can be used as a criterion to grant a discount when the item is sold to a certain customer.
trans-unit.target: Angiver en varegruppekode, der kan bruges som kriterie til at tildele en rabat, når varen sælges til en bestemt debitor.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Item Disc. Group - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies how items are tracked in the supply chain.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, hvor mange af varerne der spores i forsyningskæden.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Item Tracking Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies when the item card was last modified.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, hvornår varekortet sidst blev ændret.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Last Date Modified - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the most recent direct unit cost that was paid for the item.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den seneste købspris, der er betalt for varen.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Last Direct Cost - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies a date formula for the amount of time it takes to replenish the item.
trans-unit.target: Angiver en datoformel for det tidsrum, det tager at genopfylde varen.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Lead Time Calculation - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies if additional orders for any related components are calculated.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, om der skal foretages beregninger af yderligere ordrer for tilknyttede komponenter.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Manufacturing Policy - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of the item.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the item's indirect cost as an absolute amount.
trans-unit.target: Angiver varens indirekte omkostning som et absolut beløb.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Overhead Rate - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the relationship between the Unit Cost, Unit Price, and Profit Percentage fields associated with this item.
trans-unit.target: Angiver relationen mellem felterne Kostpris, Enhedspris og Avancepct. for denne vare.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Price/Profit Calculation - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the profit margin that you want to sell the item at. You can enter a profit percentage manually or have it entered according to the Price/Profit Calculation field
trans-unit.target: Angiver den dækningsgrad, du vil sælge varen til. Du kan angive en avanceprocent manuelt eller få den angivet i henhold til feltet Avancepct.beregning
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Profit % - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unit of measure code used when you purchase the item.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den enhedskode, der bruges, når du køber varen.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Purch. Unit of Measure - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the type of supply order created by the planning system when the item needs to be replenished.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, hvilken type forsyningsordre der oprettes af planlægningssystemet, når varen skal genbestilles.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Replenishment System - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of the production routing that the item is used in.
trans-unit.target: Angiver nummeret på produktionsruten som varen bruges i.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Routing No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unit of measure code used when you sell the item.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den enhedskode, der skal bruges, når du sælger varen.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Sales Unit of Measure - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies a search description that you use to find the item in lists.
trans-unit.target: Angiver en søgebeskrivelse, som du kan bruge til at finde varen på lister.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Search Description - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies where to find the item in the warehouse. This is informational only.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, hvor varen skal findes på lagerstedet. Det er kun til orientering.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Shelf No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unit cost that is used as an estimation to be adjusted with variances later. It is typically used in assembly and production where costs can vary.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den kostpris, der anvendes som et overslag, hvor afvigelser kan justeres på et senere tidspunkt. Dette anvendes typisk ved montage og produktion, hvor omkostningerne varierer.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Standard Cost - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies that a stockkeeping unit exists for this item.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, at der findes en lagervare (SKU) for denne vare.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Stockkeeping Unit Exists - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies a code for the item's tariff number.
trans-unit.target: Angiver en kode for varens tarifnummer.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Tariff No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the cost per unit of the item.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Unit Cost - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the price for one unit of the item.
trans-unit.target: Angiver pris for en enhed af varen.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Unit Price - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the VAT product posting group. Links business transactions made for the item, resource, or G/L account with the general ledger, to account for VAT amounts resulting from trade with that record.
trans-unit.target: Angiver momsproduktbogføringsgruppen. Knytter forretningstransaktioner for varen, ressourcen eller finanskontoen til finansregnskabet for at gøre rede for momsbeløbet som følge af handlen med den pågældende record.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control VAT Prod. Posting Group - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number that the vendor uses for this item.
trans-unit.target: Angiver det nummer, som kreditoren bruger til denne vare.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Vendor Item No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the vendor code of who supplies this item by default.

trans-unit.note: Page COL Item Planning Lookup - Control Vendor No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Add a line for each component on the bill of materials for the selected item. For example, this is useful for selling the parent item as a kit. CAUTION: The line for the parent item will be deleted and only its description will display. To undo this action, delete the component lines and add a line for the parent item again.
trans-unit.target: Tilføj en linje for hver komponent på styklisten for den valgte vare. Det er f.eks. nyttigt ved salg af den overordnede varer som en pakke. ADVARSEL! Linjen for den overordnede vare bliver slettet, og kun den tilhørende beskrivelse vil blive vist. Hvis du vil fortryde denne handling, skal du slette komponentlinjerne og tilføje en linje for den overordnede vare igen.

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date when the item is planned to arrive in inventory. Forward calculation: planned receipt date = order date + vendor lead time (per the vendor calendar and rounded to the next working day in first the vendor calendar and then the location calendar). If no vendor calendar exists, then: planned receipt date = order date + vendor lead time (per the location calendar). Backward calculation: order date = planned receipt date - vendor lead time (per the vendor calendar and rounded to the previous working day in first the vendor calendar and then the location calendar). If no vendor calendar exists, then: order date = planned receipt date - vendor lead time (per the location calendar).
trans-unit.target: Angiver den dato, hvor varen skal ankomme på lageret. Forlæns beregning: planlagt modtagelsesdato = ordredato + kreditors leveringstid (ifølge kreditorens kalender og afrundet til næste arbejdsdag først i kreditorens kalender og derefter lokationens kalender). Hvis der ingen kalender findes hos kreditoren: planlagt modtagelsesdato = ordredato + kreditors leveringstid (ifølge lokationens kalender). Baglæns beregning: ordredato = planlagt modtagelsesdato - kreditors leveringstid (ifølge kreditorens kalender og afrundet til den forrige arbejdsdag først i kreditorens kalender og derefter lokationens kalender). Hvis der ingen kalender findes hos kreditoren: ordredato = planlagt modtagelsesdato - kreditors leveringstid (ifølge lokations kalender).
trans-unit.note: PageExtension COL Purchase Lines - Control COL Planned Receipt Date - Property ToolTip

Page COL SKU Planning FactBox - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the quantity of an item in planning worksheet lines.
trans-unit.target: Angiver antallet af en vare i planlægningskladdelinjer.
trans-unit.note: Page COL SKU Planning FactBox - Control COL Qty. in Planning - Property ToolTip
Page COL SKU Planning FactBox - Control COL Qty. in Planning - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies a period of time during which you do not want the planning system to propose to reschedule existing supply orders.
trans-unit.target: Angiver en tidsperiode, hvor planlægningsprogrammet ikke skal foreslå omplanlægning af eksisterende forsyningsordrer.
trans-unit.note: Page COL SKU Planning FactBox - Control Dampener Period - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies a dampener quantity to block insignificant change suggestions for an existing supply, if the change quantity is lower than the dampener quantity.
trans-unit.target: Angiver et bufferantal til spærring af ubetydelige ændringsforslag for en eksisterende levering, hvis ændringsantallet er lavere end bufferantallet.
trans-unit.note: Page COL SKU Planning FactBox - Control Dampener Quantity - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies a period in which multiple demands are accumulated into one supply order when you use the Lot-for-Lot reordering policy.
trans-unit.target: Angiver en periode, hvor flere krav er akkumuleret i én forsyningsordre, når du bruger Lot-for-Lot-genbestilllingsmetoden.
trans-unit.note: Page COL SKU Planning FactBox - Control Lot Accumulation Period - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies a quantity that you want to use as a maximum inventory level.
trans-unit.target: Angiver det antal, som du vil bruge som maks. lagerbeholdning.
trans-unit.note: Page COL SKU Planning FactBox - Control Maximum Inventory - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies a maximum allowable quantity for an item order proposal.
trans-unit.target: Angiver det maksimalt tilladte vareantal i et ordreforslag.
trans-unit.note: Page COL SKU Planning FactBox - Control Maximum Order Quantity - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies a minimum allowable quantity for an item order proposal.
trans-unit.target: Angiver det mindste tilladte vareantal i et ordreforslag.
trans-unit.note: Page COL SKU Planning FactBox - Control Minimum Order Quantity - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies a parameter used by the planning system to round the quantity of planned supply orders to a multiple of this value.
trans-unit.target: Angiver en parameter, som planlægningssystemet bruger til at runde antallet af planlagte forsyningsordrer til et multiplum af denne værdi.
trans-unit.note: Page COL SKU Planning FactBox - Control Order Multiple - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies a quantity you allow projected inventory to exceed the reorder point, before the system suggests to decrease supply orders.
trans-unit.target: Angiver et antal, som du tillader den planlagte beholdning at overstige genbestillingspunktet med, før systemet foreslår at reducere forsyningsordrerne.
trans-unit.note: Page COL SKU Planning FactBox - Control Overflow Level - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies a stock quantity that sets the inventory below the level that you must replenish the item.
trans-unit.target: Angiver et antal varer på lager, der ligger under det niveau, hvor varen skal genbestilles.
trans-unit.note: Page COL SKU Planning FactBox - Control Reorder Point - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies a standard lot size quantity to be used for all order proposals.
trans-unit.target: Angiver et standardantal for lotstørrelse, der skal bruges ved alle ordreforslag.
trans-unit.note: Page COL SKU Planning FactBox - Control Reorder Quantity - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the reordering policy that is used to calculate the lot size per planning period (time bucket).
trans-unit.target: Angiver den genbestillingspolitik, der bruges til at beregne lotstørrelse pr. planlægningsperiode (interval).
trans-unit.note: Page COL SKU Planning FactBox - Control Reordering Policy - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies a period within which any suggestion to change a supply date always consists of a Reschedule action and never a Cancel + New action.
trans-unit.target: Angiver en periode, inden for hvilken alle forslag om at ændre en forsyningsdato altid består af handlingen Omplanlæg og aldrig af handlingen Annuller + Ny.
trans-unit.note: Page COL SKU Planning FactBox - Control Rescheduling Period - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies a date formula to indicate a safety lead time that can be used as a buffer period for production and other delays.
trans-unit.target: Angiver en datoformel, som angiver den sikkerhedstid, der kan bruges som bufferperiode i forbindelse med produktion og andre forsinkelser.
trans-unit.note: Page COL SKU Planning FactBox - Control Safety Lead Time - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies a quantity of stock to have in inventory to protect against supply-and-demand fluctuations during replenishment lead time.
trans-unit.target: Angiver et antal varer, der skal være på lager for at være forberedt på udsving i udbud og efterspørgsel ved forsinkelser i leveringstiden.
trans-unit.note: Page COL SKU Planning FactBox - Control Safety Stock Quantity - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of the item.
trans-unit.note: Page COL SKU Planning FactBox - Control SKU No. - Property ToolTip
Page COL SKU Planning FactBox - Control SKU No. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies a time period that defines the recurring planning horizon used with Fixed Reorder Qty. or Maximum Qty. reordering policies.
trans-unit.target: Angiver en periode for den tilbagevendende planlægningshorisont, der bruges til genbestillingsmetoderne Fast genbestil.antal eller Maks. antal.
trans-unit.note: Page COL SKU Planning FactBox - Control Time Bucket - Property ToolTip
Page COL SKU Replenishment FactBox - Property Caption
Page COL SKU Replenishment FactBox - Control Purchase - Property Caption
Page COL SKU Replenishment FactBox - Control COL Item Reference - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number that the vendor uses for this item.

trans-unit.note: Page COL SKU Replenishment FactBox - Control Vendor Item No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the code of the vendor from whom this item is supplied by default.
trans-unit.target: Angiver koden for den kreditor, denne vare som standard leveres fra.
trans-unit.note: Page COL SKU Replenishment FactBox - Control Vendor No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the type of supply order that is created by the planning system when the item needs to be replenished.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, hvilken type forsyningsordre der oprettes af planlægningssystemet, når varen skal genbestilles.
trans-unit.note: Page COL SKU Replenishment FactBox - Control Replenishment System - Property ToolTip

Page COL SKU Replenishment FactBox - Control SKU No. - Property Caption
Page COL Work Center Lookup - Property Caption
Page COL Work Center Lookup - Control Alternate Work Center - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the amount of work that can be done in a specified time period. The capacity of a work center indicates how many machines or persons are working at the same time. If you enter 2, for example, the work center will take half of the time compared to a work center with the capacity of 1.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den mængde arbejde, der kan udføres i en bestemt tidsperiode. Kapaciteten i et arbejdscenter angiver, hvor mange maskiner eller personer, der arbejder samtidig. Hvis du f.eks. angiver 2, betyder det, at arbejdscentret skal bruge det halve af den tid, som et arbejdscenter med kapaciteten 1 skal bruge.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Work Center Lookup - Control Capacity - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the cost of one unit of the selected item or resource.
trans-unit.target: Angiver kostprisen pr. enhed af den valgte vare eller ressource.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Work Center Lookup - Control Direct Unit Cost - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the efficiency factor as a percentage of the work center.
trans-unit.target: Angiver arbejdscenterets effektivitetsfaktor som en procentdel.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Work Center Lookup - Control Efficiency - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies how consumption of the item (component) is calculated and handled in production processes. Manual: Enter and post consumption in the consumption journal manually. Forward: Automatically posts consumption according to the production order component lines when the first operation starts. Backward: Automatically calculates and posts consumption according to the production order component lines when the production order is finished. Pick + Forward / Pick + Backward: Variations with warehousing.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, hvordan forbruget af varen (komponenten) beregnes og håndteres i produktionsprocesserne. Manuelt: Angiv og bogfør forbrug i forbrugskladden manuelt. Fremad: Bogfører automatisk forbrug ifølge produktionsordrekomponentlinjerne, når den første handling starter. Baglæns: Beregner og bogfører automatisk forbrug ifølge produktionsordrekomponentlinjerne, når produktionsordren er færdig. Pluk + Fremad / Pluk + Baglæns: Variationer med lagersted.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Work Center Lookup - Control Flushing Method - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.
trans-unit.target: Angiver koden for den globale dimension, der er knyttet til recorden eller posten med henblik på analyse. To globale dimensioner, typiske for virksomhedens vigtigste aktiviteter, er tilgængelige på alle kort, bilag, rapporter og lister.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Work Center Lookup - Control Global Dimension 1 Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.
trans-unit.target: Angiver koden for den globale dimension, der er knyttet til recorden eller posten med henblik på analyse. To globale dimensioner, typiske for virksomhedens vigtigste aktiviteter, er tilgængelige på alle kort, bilag, rapporter og lister.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Work Center Lookup - Control Global Dimension 2 Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the percentage of the center's cost that includes indirect costs, such as machine maintenance.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den procentdel af centrets omkostning, der omfatter indirekte omkostninger, såsom vedligeholdelse af maskiner.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Work Center Lookup - Control Indirect Cost % - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies when the work center card was last modified.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, hvornår arbejdscenterkortet sidst blev ændret.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Work Center Lookup - Control Last Date Modified - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the maximum efficiency factor of the work center.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den maksimale effektivitetsfaktor for arbejdscenteret.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Work Center Lookup - Control Maximum Efficiency - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the minimum efficiency factor of the work center.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den minimale effektivitetsfaktor for arbejdscenteret.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Work Center Lookup - Control Minimum Efficiency - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the work center.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Work Center Lookup - Control Name - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.
trans-unit.target: Angiver nummeret på den tilknyttede post eller record i overensstemmelse med den angivne nummerserie.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Work Center Lookup - Control No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the overhead rate of this work center.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Work Center Lookup - Control Overhead Rate - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies an alternate name that you can use to search for the record in question when you cannot remember the value in the Name field.
trans-unit.target: Angiver et alternativt navn, du kan bruge til at søge efter den ønskede record, hvis du ikke kan huske værdien i feltet Navn.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Work Center Lookup - Control Search Name - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the shop calendar code that the planning of this work center refers to.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den produktionskalenderkode, som planlægningen for arbejdscenteret henviser til.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Work Center Lookup - Control Shop Calendar Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the simulation type for the work center.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Work Center Lookup - Control Simulation Type - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of a subcontractor who supplies this work center.
trans-unit.target: Angiver nummeret på den underleverandør, der forsyner arbejdscenteret.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Work Center Lookup - Control Subcontractor No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the cost of one unit of the item or resource on the line.
trans-unit.target: Angiver omkostningen, på én enhed af varen eller ressourcen på linjen.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Work Center Lookup - Control Unit Cost - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, hvordan hver enhed af varen eller ressourcen måles, f.eks. i enheder eller timer. Som standard indsættes værdien i feltet Basisenhed på kortet vare eller ressource.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Work Center Lookup - Control Unit of Measure Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the work center group, if the work center or underlying machine center is assigned to a work center group.
trans-unit.target: Angiver arbejdscentergruppen, hvis arbejdscenteret eller den underliggende produktionsressource er tilknyttet en arbejdscentergruppe.
trans-unit.note: Page COL Work Center Lookup - Control Work Center Group Code - Property ToolTip
